---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new model, explainer, metric, or other improvement
title: "[Feature]"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Motivation / use case

What problem would this solve, and who benefits? If it relates to a published
method, please link the paper.

## Component area

Which part of XAI4TSC does this touch?

- [ ] Model
- [ ] Explainer
- [ ] Metric
- [ ] Experiment runner / config
- [ ] Data
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you discarded them.

## Additional context

Anything else — references, sketches, or related issues.
